concerns.text: Task T035 (Theoretical Baseline Calculation) is marked as incomplete [ ] and T023 (Result Aggregation) is marked incomplete [ ]. T023 explicitly depends on T035. Without these tasks being actionable (checked or re-scoped), the implementation of User Story 2 (FR-003, FR-004) and User Story 3 (SC-001, SC-002) cannot be completed. The plan requires theoretical baselines to be calculated and recorded.

Task T027 (Unit test for plot generation logic) is marked incomplete [ ]. User Story 3 (FR-007) requires generating visualizations. While T030/T031 implement the plots, the absence of a corresponding test task (T027) leaves the verification of FR-007 incomplete, violating the 'Independent Test' requirement for US-3.

Task T025 (Cross-implementation consistency check) is marked incomplete [ ]. Spec US-1 Acceptance Scenario 3 requires that 'all three implementations produce identical membership results'. While T016 adds validation logic, T025 is the specific task to 'Execute' this check on aggregated results. Its incomplete status leaves the validation of US-1 AC3 unverified in the task list.

Task T028 (Kruskal-Wallis H-test logic) is marked incomplete [ ]. This is the core implementation for FR-006 and SC-003. Without this task being actionable, the statistical analysis required by User Story 3 cannot be performed.

Task T032 (Compute and log p-values) is marked incomplete [ ]. This is required to satisfy SC-003 (Statistical significance measured against alpha=0.05). The task is essential for the output of User Story 3.

Task T042 (CV calculation) and T043 (CV enforcement) are marked incomplete [ ]. These are required to satisfy SC-004 (Reproducibility measured against CV <= 15%). Without these tasks, the project cannot validate the reproducibility constraint.

Task T050 (Update README) is marked incomplete [ ]. While often a polish task, the spec implies a deliverable. More critically, T056 (Run quickstart.md validation) is incomplete, which blocks the verification of the entire pipeline's executability as a deliverable.

Task T057 (Verify no [deferred] placeholders) is marked incomplete [ ]. The spec and plan rely on [deferred] markers for empirical values. This task is critical to ensure the final implementation resolves these placeholders with actual values or valid logic, satisfying the transition from planning to execution.
